nasb.text: They stooped over, they have bowed down together; They could not rescue the burden, But have themselves gone into captivity.

esv.text: They stoop; they bow down together; they cannot save the burden, but themselves go into captivity.

cnv.text: 它們一同彎腰、俯伏， 不能保護重負， 它們自己反倒被擄去了。

ccb.text: 它们一同屈膝降服， 不但救不了被掳的巴比伦人， 自己也被掳去。

csbs.text: 它们一同屈蹲、屈伏， 不但不能保全负载， 连自己也被掳去了。
